name: Apricot Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Maple syrup (OR 1 cup Brown sugar)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak apricots in water for 20 minutes.
2. Mix together flour, baking powder, and baking soda in a bowl.
3. In another bowl, beat maple syrup (or brown sugar), butter, and egg.
4. Drain the water from the soaked apricots into orange liqueur.
5. Stir the flour mixture into the butter mixture a little at a time, alternating with the liqueur mixture.
6. Stir in the apricots and nuts.
7. Pour the batter into a lightly oiled 9-inch x 5-inch loaf pan.
8. Bake at 350°F for 45-60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
9. Cool before cutting.
